name: Avalon Acquisition Inc. Units
summary: Avalon Acquisition Inc. Units consist of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Avalon Acquisition Inc. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Avalon Acquisition Inc. has not yet specified a target industry.
